home.hero_subtitle: AI Powered Campus Life for Gen Z Students
home.hero_desc: Your intelligent campus companion — manage attendance, fees, courses, and more with the power of AI.
home.features_subtitle: Powered by AI, designed for Gen Z students across Tamil Nadu engineering colleges.
home.feat_chatbot_desc: Get instant answers about schedules, syllabus, fees, and campus info in Tamil or English.
home.feat_dashboard_desc: A unified view of attendance, performance, exams, and upcoming events.
home.feat_attendance_desc: Real-time subject-wise attendance tracking with smart alerts.
home.feat_fees_desc: Never miss a deadline with automated fee reminders and payment status tracking.
home.feat_courses_desc: Detailed subject info, faculty, syllabus, and credits at your fingertips.
home.feat_analytics_desc: Visual charts and insights to track your academic progress.
home.cta_title: Ready to Transform Your Campus Experience?
home.cta_desc: Join thousands of students already using CampusAI Hub across Tamil Nadu.
